name: auto-format-prettier
description: Auto-format JS/TS/JSON/CSS files with Prettier after every edit

name: auto-format-eslint
description: Auto-fix ESLint issues after every edit

name: auto-format-biome
description: Auto-format with Biome after every edit

name: auto-format-ruff
description: Auto-format Python files with Ruff after every edit

name: auto-format-gofmt
description: Auto-format Go files with gofmt after every edit

name: auto-format-rustfmt
description: Auto-format Rust files with rustfmt after every edit

name: notify-on-stop
description: Desktop notification when Claude finishes a task, showing current project name

hook.command: PROJECT=$(basename "$PWD"); MSG="Done in $PROJECT"; osascript -e "display notification \"$MSG\" with title \"Claude Code\" sound name \"Glass\"" 2>/dev/null || notify-send 'Claude Code' "$MSG" 2>/dev/null || true

name: block-dangerous-bash
description: Block dangerous bash commands (destructive deletes, force push, DROP TABLE, kill, chmod 777)

hook.command: CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qiE '(rm\s+-[rf]{1,2}\s+/|rm\s+-rf|DROP\s+(TABLE|DATABASE|SCHEMA)|TRUNCATE\s+TABLE|git\s+push\s+(--force|-f)|git\s+reset\s+--hard|pkill|kill\s+-9|chmod\s+777|mkfs\.|dd\s+if=.*of=/dev/)'; then echo "BLOCK: Dangerous command detected — confirm with user before running: $CMD" >&2; exit 2; fi

name: check-secrets
description: Block writing files that contain hardcoded secrets, API keys, or private keys

hook.command: CONTENT="${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_NEW_STRING:-}${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_CONTENT:-}"; if echo "$CONTENT" | grep -qE '(sk-[a-zA-Z0-9]{20,}|AKIA[A-Z0-9]{16}|ghp_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36,}|ghs_[a-zA-Z0-9]{36,}|-----BEGIN (RSA|EC|DSA|OPENSSH) PRIVATE KEY|AIza[0-9A-Za-z-_]{35}|xox[baprs]-[0-9A-Za-z]{10,})'; then echo "BLOCK: Potential hardcoded secret detected. Use environment variables instead." >&2; exit 2; fi

name: prevent-test-skip
description: Warn when .skip() or .only() test modifiers are added, which can exclude tests from CI

hook.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(test|spec)\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then if grep -qE '\.(skip|only)\s*\(' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "WARNING: .skip() or .only() found in $FILE — remove before committing to avoid skipping CI tests" >&2; fi; fi

name: file-guard
description: Block access to sensitive files (.env, private keys, credentials) based on .claudeignore patterns — standalone clone of claudekit file-guard

name: lint-changed
description: Run Biome or ESLint on the changed file after every edit — standalone clone of claudekit lint-changed

name: typecheck-changed
description: Run tsc --noEmit when a TypeScript file changes — standalone clone of claudekit typecheck-changed

name: check-any-changed
description: Forbid explicit `any` types in changed TypeScript files — standalone clone of claudekit check-any-changed

name: test-changed
description: Find and run tests related to the changed file — standalone clone of claudekit test-changed

name: check-comment-replacement
description: Block edits that replace real code with explanatory comments — standalone clone of claudekit check-comment-replacement

name: check-unused-parameters
description: Block underscore-prefixed parameters that indicate lazy refactoring — standalone clone of claudekit check-unused-parameters

name: typecheck-project
description: Run tsc --noEmit on the entire project at Stop — standalone clone of claudekit typecheck-project

name: lint-project
description: Run Biome or ESLint on the entire project at Stop — standalone clone of claudekit lint-project

name: test-project
description: Run the full test suite at Stop — standalone clone of claudekit test-project

name: check-todos
description: Block Stop if there are incomplete TodoWrite items in the session — standalone clone of claudekit check-todos

name: self-review
description: Prompt Claude to critically self-review before stopping — standalone clone of claudekit self-review
